title: Annual Reserve Audit — No Discrepancies Found
summary: The Board of Governors confirms full reconciliation of aluminum ingot reserves held at the Foundry. Circulating supply verified at 312 units.

title: Second Denomination Released: The Alu-5
summary: Following unanimous Board consent, the five-unit denomination enters circulation. Strike count: 12. Exchange rate adjusted accordingly.

title: Inaugural Strike — The Banco·Bral Opens
summary: Six Governors convene in the Foundry. First coins struck from reclaimed beer-can stock. The aluminum standard is established.
